name: EXSA
description: 5-layer CSS framework. Token cascade → reset → layout → elements → components. Zero build, zero CLI, pure plug & play.

1_tokens.label: Layer 1 — Tokens (CSS custom properties)
1_tokens.desc: 36 design tokens. Colors, spacing, shadows, type.

2_reset.label: Layer 2 — Reset
2_reset.desc: Box model, focus rings, RTL, scrollbar, body defaults.

3_layout.label: Layer 3 — Layout Utilities
3_layout.desc: 65+ flex & grid utilities. No prefix needed.

core.description: Complete core (19.5 KB): tokens, reset, layout utilities, classless element styles for nav, table, form, button, blockquote, dialog, and more. One file, one link.

layout.description: Layout utilities are built into style.css. Flex, grid, gaps, containers, responsive columns — no .exsa prefix needed.

components.name: Accordion
components.desc: Pure CSS expandable sections using checkbox hack. Add .accordion--sm for compact variant.

components.name: Drawer
components.desc: Slide-in panel from screen edge. Toggle with checkbox or JS.

components.name: Footer
components.desc: Multi-column site footer with brand, link groups, tagline, and copyright bar.

components.name: Modal Window
components.desc: Overlay dialog with backdrop. Open/close with JS, Escape key, and overlay click.

components.name: Pricing Table
components.desc: Comparison pricing cards with highlight column and feature lists.

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.desc: Vertical navigation sidebar with icons, collapsible sub-menus, and active states.

components.name: Topbar / Navbar
components.desc: Fixed top navigation bar. Transparent at top, solid with backdrop-blur on scroll. Mobile hamburger menu.

components.name: Back to Top
components.desc: Floating button that appears on scroll. Smooth scroll-to-top on click.

components.name: Breadcrumbs
components.desc: Path navigation trail with separators. Pure CSS.

components.name: Pagination
components.desc: Page navigation with prev/next and numbered links.

components.name: Stepper
components.desc: Multi-step progress indicator with active/completed/done states.

components.name: Timeline
components.desc: Vertical event timeline with alternating sides and connector line.

components.name: Tooltip
components.desc: Hover tooltip using data-tooltip attribute. Positions: top, bottom, left, right.

components.name: Context Menu
components.desc: Right-click popup menu with items, separators, shortcuts, danger actions, and soft/solid variants. Closes on outside click or Escape.

components.name: Avatar
components.desc: Circular user avatar with sizes (sm/md/lg/xl) and status dot colors.

components.name: Badge
components.desc: Inline badge/tag with color variants and rounded pill style.

components.name: Card
components.desc: Content container with header, body, footer sections and hover lift effect.

components.name: Table
components.desc: Responsive data table with striped rows, hover highlight, and compact variant.

components.name: Data List
components.desc: Key-value metadata display using <dl>/<dt>/<dd>. Horizontal or vertical orientation. Bordered, striped, and size variants.

components.name: Separator
components.desc: Horizontal or vertical divider. Three sizes: sm, default, lg. Uses --color-bg-secondary.

components.name: Code Block
components.desc: Syntax-highlighted code block with header bar, language label, and copy-to-clipboard button with Copied! feedback. No-header and compact variants.

components.name: Lightbox
components.desc: Fullscreen image gallery overlay with thumbnail grid, prev/next, and keyboard nav.

components.name: Music Player
components.desc: Audio player UI with play/pause, progress bar, and time display.

components.name: Video Gallery
components.desc: Responsive video card grid. Click opens iframe modal with autoplay.

components.name: Slideshow
components.desc: Auto-playing image carousel with navigation dots, prev/next arrows, and keyboard.

components.name: Donut Chart
components.desc: SVG/CSS donut/ring chart with conic-gradient and center label.

components.name: Bar Chart
components.desc: CSS bar chart using flexbox bars with labels, values, and color variants.

components.name: Progress Bars
components.desc: Horizontal progress bar with percentage, color states, and striped animated variant.

components.name: Range Slider
components.desc: Styled range input with custom track/thumb. JS shows live value.

components.name: Checkbox
components.desc: Custom styled checkbox with checked state animation. Pure CSS.

components.name: Color Picker
components.desc: Styled native color input with swatch preview, hex value display, and sm/default/lg sizes.

components.name: Date Picker
components.desc: Interactive calendar popup with month navigation, today highlight, and date selection. Adapted from GeeksForGeeks.

components.name: Dropdown Menu
components.desc: Click-triggered popup with items, shortcuts, labels, separators, danger actions. Solid/soft variants, sm size.

components.name: Form Validation
components.desc: Input error/success states with helper text and icon indicators.

components.name: Input Group
components.desc: Input with appended/prepended text or icon. Button addon support.

components.name: Password Input
components.desc: Password field with show/hide toggle button.

components.name: Popover
components.desc: Click-triggered floating card for rich content (forms, text, media). Arrow, 4 sizes, start/end alignment. Closes on outside click or Escape.

components.name: Radio Button
components.desc: Custom styled radio buttons with selected state. Pure CSS.

components.name: Rating Stars
components.desc: Interactive 5-star rating widget. Click to set, hover to preview.

components.name: Styled Select
components.desc: Custom select wrapper with chevron icon, focus ring, and sm/default/lg sizes.

components.name: Tabs
components.desc: Tabbed interface with active tab underline. JS switches panels.

components.name: Toggle Switch
components.desc: iOS-style toggle switch using checkbox hack. Pure CSS, no JS needed.

components.name: Alert / Callout
components.desc: Notification banners with 4 colors, 3 styles (soft/outline/surface), 3 sizes (sm/default/lg), icon, title, message, and dismiss button.

components.name: Cookie Bar
components.desc: Fixed bottom cookie consent banner with accept button. JS handles dismiss.

components.name: Skeleton Loader
components.desc: Content placeholder shimmer animation for loading states. Pure CSS.

components.name: Spinner
components.desc: CSS-only loading spinner with size and color variants.

components.name: Toast Notifications
components.desc: Corner notification popups (success/error/info). Auto-dismiss with animation.

components.name: Form Validation Helpers
components.desc: Auto-detects :user-invalid forms and adds required-field asterisks. Classless form/table/blockquote/dialog baselines are now in style.css.

components.name: Buttons
components.desc: Button system with 9 variants (primary, success, danger, warning, neutral, outline, ghost, soft, surface), 4 sizes (xs, sm, default, lg), built-in loading spinner, high-contrast mode, pill/square radius, icon-only, and block.

components.name: Panel Resizer
components.desc: Drag handle for resizable panels. Horizontal and vertical variants. Requires JS.

behaviors.name: Dropdown Menu
behaviors.desc: Click toggle + outside click dismiss

behaviors.name: Slideshow
behaviors.desc: Auto-play carousel with dots, arrows, and keyboard navigation

behaviors.name: Music Player
behaviors.desc: Play/pause toggle with elapsed time display

behaviors.name: Tabs
behaviors.desc: Tab panel switching with active state management

behaviors.name: Rating Stars
behaviors.desc: Interactive 5-star rating with hover preview

behaviors.name: Toast Notifications
behaviors.desc: Auto-dismiss notification popups with slide-out animation

behaviors.name: Video Gallery
behaviors.desc: Click-to-play video modal with iframe embed

behaviors.name: Modal Window
behaviors.desc: Open/close with overlay click, Escape key, and button triggers

behaviors.name: Lightbox Gallery
behaviors.desc: Fullscreen image viewer with thumbnail grid and keyboard arrows

behaviors.name: Cookie Consent Bar
behaviors.desc: Show/hide fixed cookie consent banner with localStorage

behaviors.name: Back to Top
behaviors.desc: Show button on scroll, smooth scroll-to-top on click

behaviors.name: Range Slider Value
behaviors.desc: Live numeric value display next to range slider

behaviors.name: Password Toggle
behaviors.desc: Show/hide password field text on button click

behaviors.name: Topbar
behaviors.desc: Scroll transparency + mobile hamburger menu + dropdown toggles

behaviors.name: Date Picker
behaviors.desc: Calendar popup with month navigation, date selection, and outside-click dismiss

behaviors.name: Color Picker
behaviors.desc: Native color input with swatch preview and hex value display

behaviors.name: Theme Switcher
behaviors.desc: Dynamic theme CSS swap with localStorage persistence

behaviors.name: Panel Resizer
behaviors.desc: Drag-to-resize panel handle (horizontal and vertical)

behaviors.name: Sidebar Navigation
behaviors.desc: Collapsible sub-menu accordion toggle on sidebar links

behaviors.name: Scroll Spy
behaviors.desc: Highlights nav links based on scroll position. Add data-scroll-spy to the nav.

behaviors.name: Accordion ARIA
behaviors.desc: Syncs aria-expanded on accordion labels with checkbox state for screen readers

behaviors.name: Toggle Switch ARIA
behaviors.desc: Adds role=switch and aria-checked to toggle inputs for proper screen reader announcement

behaviors.name: Drawer ARIA
behaviors.desc: Syncs aria-expanded on drawer trigger labels with checkbox open/close state

behaviors.name: Focus Trap Utility
behaviors.desc: Trap keyboard focus inside a container (modal, drawer, lightbox). Required by modal/drawer/lightbox/video-gallery.

behaviors.name: RTL Toggle
behaviors.desc: Toggle html[dir] between ltr/rtl with localStorage persistence

behaviors.name: Context Menu
behaviors.desc: Right-click popup with viewport clamping, backdrop dismiss, and Escape key

behaviors.name: Popover
behaviors.desc: Click-triggered floating card with backdrop dismiss, Escape key, and single-open enforcement

behaviors.name: Code Block Copy
behaviors.desc: Copy code content to clipboard with 'Copied!' feedback state
